174.reason: [Incorrectly records "||" as token even when input is just "|", which is an error; should not generate a valid token for erroneous single "&" or "|"]

176.reason: [Same issue: records "&&" as token when input is just "&", which is invalid; this masks the lexical error by outputting a wrong token]
